hero.title: Therapy, Counselling & Coaching for Men
hero.subtitle: BACP-registered therapist specialising in working with men. Online across the UK and worldwide.

intro:
## Therapy

I know that traditional therapeutic approaches don't feel comfortable for a lot of men. That's why I run a practice tailored specifically to the needs of male clients.

You won’t need to come in knowing what to say. I specialise in working with men attending therapy for the first time or those struggling to open up. That means you don’t have to explain yourself perfectly. We’ll talk about where you’re at, how you got here and what you’re holding on to.

I help men who feel stuck, ashamed, emotionally flat or like they’re drifting further away from themselves. Whether it’s something long-standing or something that’s come up recently – substance abuse, anger, burnout, relationship issues, identity, porn use or loss – we'll work together to understand what’s really going on and start building something healthier and more honest

My approach is collaborative, practical and tailored to you. Drawing on a range of therapeutic approaches, including coaching, I won't simply sit in silence. I'll challenge and encourage you where it's helpful and support you in connecting the dots between your past, your present and where you'd like to go next.

## Coaching

Alongside therapy, I also offer one-to-one coaching for men who want a more direct, action-oriented approach. Coaching is ideal for those who feel stuck rather than unwell, whether that's in their relationships, communication, confidence, career or sense of direction.

As a former sports coach, I naturally bring energy, accountability and encouragement into my work. We'll focus on where you are now, where you want to be and the practical steps needed to get there. My role isn't to tell you what to do, but to help you challenge unhelpful patterns, develop greater self-awareness and take meaningful action.

Coaching is more structured and future-focused than therapy, combining honest conversation with practical strategies and ongoing accountability. If you're looking for someone who will simply nod along, I'm probably not the right coach. If you're looking for someone who will support you, challenge you and help you keep moving forwards, we'll probably work well together.

qualifications.title: Training & Qualifications
items: Registered member of the British Association of Counselling & Psychotherapy (BACP)
PGDip Integrative Counselling and Coaching (University of East London)
Foundation in Psychodynamic Counselling Skills — WPF Therapy
qualifications.regulatorNote: Accountable to the Professional Standards Authority via the BACP register.

items.title: Therapy & Counselling
items.body:
I understand that therapy can be expensive for some, so I hope to make it as affordable as possible by offering a sliding scale, based on income. I also offer concessionary rates, on a case-by-case basis. 

We'll do weekly sessions in blocks of four, paid upfront before each block commences.

items.title: Coaching
items.body:
Coaching is available as individual sessions or as a six-session programme.

The programme includes:

- - Six one-to-one weekly sessions
- - Text/voice note support between sessions
- - Accountability and progress check-ins
- - A practical, future-focused approach designed around your aims

furtherInfo.title: Further information
furtherInfo.body:
I offer a free 15-minute intro call to help you decide whether I'm the right fit for you. Feel free to call, text or email to discuss finding a time.

You'll sign a contract which includes all the details you need to know, and we can discuss this further if needed.

seo.title: Therapist & Coach for Men | Chris Hemmings | Online in the UK & Worldwide
seo.description: Online therapy and coaching for men with Chris Hemmings, BACP-registered therapist and founder of Men's Therapy Hub. Practical support for anxiety, relationships, addiction, anger, identity and life transitions.

og.title: Honest conversations. Meaningful change.
og.subtitle: BACP registered therapist and coach helping men better understand themselves, strengthen relationships and move forwards with confidence.
